_comment: Template for a childJob task. actor MUST be 'job', task MUST be empty string (engine auto-sets at runtime). Variables use {task, value} syntax — NOT $var. Example: {"task": "job", "value": "myVar"} passes the parent's job variable 'myVar' to the child. Use {"task": "static", "value": "literal"} for static values. job_details is often empty — child results stay in the child job's variables unless the child explicitly sets job_output.
name: childJob
description: Runs another workflow as a child job
